reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 (Dead Code): PASS - validateGossipDataColumnSidecar is actively called from gossipHandlers.ts:317 in P2P gossip processing. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): PASS - Attack is via untrusted P2P network (p2p_peers trust_level = UNTRUSTED). Gate 3 (Code Verification): PASS - The code reading is factually correct. seenGossipBlockInput.getByColumn() (seenGossipBlockInput.ts:272-331) keys the cache by blockRootHex only, checking blockInput.hasColumn(columnSidecar.index) at line 314. Two equivocating columns (same slot, proposer, index but different content/signatures) have different blockRootHex values, so they create separate cache entries and both pass validation. This contrasts with block validation, which uses seenBlockProposers.isKnown(blockSlot, proposerIndex) (seenBlockProposers.ts:15-16, validation/block.ts:67,173) to prevent equivocation via (slot, proposer) tuple keying. Gate 4 (Exploitability): PASS - An attacker can directly trigger this via P2P by sending two DataColumnSidecars for (slot=N, proposer=V, index=I) with different content and valid signatures (e.g., different KZG proofs or inclusion proofs that both verify). Both will be accepted and stored under different blockRootHex keys. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): PASS - The 01e property (outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:298-314) states 'Anti-equivocation cache must be updated for all imported data columns regardless of publishing' with assertion 'forall col: imported(col) => anti_equivocation_cache.contains(col.key)'. The code violates this by allowing two equivocating columns (different content, same logical key) to both be imported. Gate 6 (Scope Check): PASS - PeerDAS (EIP-7594) is explicitly in-scope per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json. Severity: High is appropriate for a single-client vulnerability enabling equivocation attacks. An attacker can trigger this via P2P by crafting two DataColumnSidecars for (slot, proposer, index) with different content but valid cryptographic proofs. Both pass validation and are stored under different blockRootHex keys, enabling equivocation.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Anti-equivocation cache must be updated for all imported data columns regardless of publishing. (forall col: imported(col) => anti_equivocation_cache.contains(col.key))
